guest.lead: From your first throw to tournament night — TrainDart combines darts training, online darts matches and a full tournament system, while auto-generated match reports turn every result into a story worth sharing.

nav.login: Already have an account? Log in

seo.title: TrainDart — Darts Training & Stats Platform
seo.description: TrainDart helps you improve accuracy with darts training programs, detailed stats and analytics, online darts matches and tournaments. Start training for free.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to become a better darts player
features.sectionLead: From your first throw to the top of the leaderboard — one platform for your growth.

stats.title: Precise stats and progress tracking
stats.desc: Follow your average, checkout %, 180s and more with detailed darts statistics and analytics that reveal your real progress.

training.title: Interactive, effective training modes
training.desc: Structured darts practice routines for doubles, trebles and finishing that help you improve accuracy with purpose.

online.title: Online matches with other players
online.desc: Challenge friends or find opponents in online darts matches anytime, anywhere.

tournaments.title: Tournament system and automatic match reports
tournaments.desc: Join organized tournaments and get an automatically generated report after every match, built from your real results.

closing.title: Ready to level up your game?
closing.lead: Join TrainDart and start tracking every dart today.
